programme.title: ATL Homicide
programme.desc: While parked in the driveway of a residential home, a man is shot multiple times in Southwest Atlanta. To solve this murder, Quinn and Vince will need to locate a key witness, solve an East Point cold case, and uncover a plot for revenge.

programme.title: Payback
programme.desc: When a man is shot in front of his children, his cousin seeks payback, sparking a months-long feud between two families and a back in forth battle of murder and arson wreaks havoc on the city of Toledo.

programme.title: Sins of the City
programme.sub-title: Sins of the City - Cincinnati, Ohio
programme.desc: Twenty years before George Floyd�s murder, Army veteran Roger Owensby Jr. was killed by Cincinnati Police under similar circumstances. His death at the hands of law enforcement would help ignite three days of violent riots throughout the city.

programme.title: Fatal Attraction
programme.desc: A young man is killed in a freak hunting accident while trying to shoot a raccoon. But is it an accident – or suicide? As police dig deeper, they uncover another, far more shocking possibility. Did a forbidden attraction and a sister’s secret jealousy lead to murder?

programme.title: Fatal Attraction
programme.desc: When a man is fatally stabbed in his home, police think they have a slam-dunk case when his live-in girlfriend identifies the man she saw fleeing the scene with a bloody knife. The problem is, detectives can’t find physical evidence to confirm her story. Could she be in danger herself, or is there a web of lies about to unravel?

programme.title: Fatal Attraction
programme.sub-title: Fatal Attraction - The Devil is Real
programme.desc: When a college student disappears on Valentine�s Day, her family worries something tragic has happened. A tipster offers a lead on what really happened, and detectives are shocked at the lengths the killer would go to ease the sting of rejection.

programme.title: For My Man
programme.sub-title: For My Man - Ashley Jones/Darlene Binyard
programme.desc: Alabama teen Ashley Jones has struggled through a life of physical abuse and psychological setbacks. But when bad boy Geramie Hart brings balance to her world, she�ll go to the ends of the earth to keep him. And in Michigan, a ride-or-die couple crashes and burns when a string of armed robberies leads police directly to their doorstep.

programme.title: For My Man
programme.sub-title: For My Man - Stephanie George/Yenesis Alfonso
programme.desc: Pensacola native Stephanie George has a thing for bad boys. But when she places her trust in an ex, she gambles with her entire future. In Sin City, Yenesis Alfonso loves the glitter and gold her man provides. Yet all the money in the world can�t stop their lavish lifestyle from going up in flames.

programme.title: For My Man
programme.sub-title: For My Man - Althea Housley/Jeri Woods
programme.desc: Oakland, California mother Althea Housley struggles to put food on the table. So when her soul mate reveals a plan to make their dreams come true, she can�t deny him. And in Gary, Indiana Jeri Woods demonstrates to her ten children just how viciously loyal they must be to her domineering husband.

programme.title: For My Man
programme.desc: When gunfire erupts, killing a 21-year-old man at a park in Burlington, North Carolina, police are shocked that their investigation leads them to a good girl whose love for a neighborhood �bad boy� has pushed her into a violent world of vice.

programme.title: For My Man
programme.sub-title: For My Man - No Good Deed Goes Unpunished
programme.desc: When a church deacon is found dead after an apartment fire, the evidence suggests foul play. Soon, detectives learn the deacon had recently opened his home to a young, single mother. Tracking her down will lead investigators to a woman desperate to create the perfect family � and willing to commit the deadliest of sins, for her man.

programme.title: Fatal Attraction
programme.desc: When an aspiring fashion designer vanishes, investigators wonder if her mental health played a role. As detectives dig into her life, they question if what they�ve been told is genuine, or if it�s all rumors designed to throw them off a killer�s trail.

programme.title: Fatal Attraction
programme.desc: A small business owner was an immigrant living the American dream in Washington, D.C. But when he�s murdered in his own pizza mart, it seems like a robbery gone wrong - until an unlikely suspect emerges with a shocking tale of lies and betrayal.

programme.title: ATL Homicide
programme.desc: When a man is found dead after a violent carjacking, a surviving witness describes two suspects. Fingerprints and mistaken identity lead the case in different directions. To ID the killer, Quinn and Vince think outside the box and try a new tactic.

programme.title: ATL Homicide
programme.desc: While parked in the driveway of a residential home, a man is shot multiple times in Southwest Atlanta. To solve this murder, Quinn and Vince will need to locate a key witness, solve an East Point cold case, and uncover a plot for revenge.

programme.title: Payback
programme.desc: When a man is shot in front of his children, his cousin seeks payback, sparking a months-long feud between two families and a back in forth battle of murder and arson wreaks havoc on the city of Toledo.

programme.title: Sins of the City
programme.sub-title: Sins of the City - Cincinnati, Ohio
programme.desc: Twenty years before George Floyd�s murder, Army veteran Roger Owensby Jr. was killed by Cincinnati Police under similar circumstances. His death at the hands of law enforcement would help ignite three days of violent riots throughout the city.

programme.title: Fatal Attraction
programme.desc: A young man is killed in a freak hunting accident while trying to shoot a raccoon. But is it an accident – or suicide? As police dig deeper, they uncover another, far more shocking possibility. Did a forbidden attraction and a sister’s secret jealousy lead to murder?

programme.title: Fatal Attraction
programme.desc: When a man is fatally stabbed in his home, police think they have a slam-dunk case when his live-in girlfriend identifies the man she saw fleeing the scene with a bloody knife. The problem is, detectives can’t find physical evidence to confirm her story. Could she be in danger herself, or is there a web of lies about to unravel?

programme.title: Fatal Attraction
programme.desc: After years of putting others first, a caring woman finds new love in an unlikely place. Then one day she disappears, and rumors begin circulating. But as everything unravels, a shocking claim is offered up, which turns the investigation on its head.

programme.title: For My Man
programme.sub-title: For My Man - Chicwanda Forbes/Carter Carol Cervantez
programme.desc: Chicwanda Forbes has worked hard to make a life for herself in New Orleans, until an older man offers her the attention she craves in exchange for her loyalty. And in Fort Worth, career-driven Carter Carol Cervantez begins to rethink her priorities when she finds love at the workplace.

programme.title: For My Man
programme.sub-title: For My Man - Dorthia Bynum/Lillian Roberts
programme.desc: Following a tumultuous childhood, Dorthia Bynum is looking for someone to heal her emotional scars. So when she finds a boy who cures what ails her, she�ll stop at nothing to ensure her place in his heart. And in Michigan, when a couple holds a young boy hostage, it leads them all on a terrifying journey from which there�s no return.

programme.title: For My Man
programme.sub-title: For My Man - Sandra Holling/Briana Hood
programme.desc: In Ohio, Sandra Holling has always fallen for the wrong type of man. When she falls for the ultimate bad boy, her love pushes her to join him in his deadly fantasies. In Athens, Georgia, Briana Hood truly believes she has married the love of her life. But when her perfect man shows his true colors, her devotion to her husband takes her on a dangerous road.

programme.title: A Mother's Intuition
programme.desc: With help from a handsome investigator, a brilliant sculptor unravels the twisted truth behind her missing newborn baby.

programme.title: Deadly Dispatch
programme.desc: After her best friend IS tragically murdered in an apparent robbery gone wrong, Tiffany Jackson takes justice in her own hands to find his killer.

programme.title: Safe Room
programme.desc: After Ian accidentally witnesses a break-in in the house across the street and records the horrific murder of the homeowner, Lila becomes embroiled in a deadly struggle to protect her son.
